name: Mu Leveler
explanation: A vari-mu tube-style compressor and leveler. It models a variable-mu valve gain stage, where the tube's effective gain falls as the signal gets louder, so compression is soft, rounded and program-dependent rather than the hard, fixed-ratio grab of a VCA or FET. Detection runs in the dB domain with a wide, soft knee; the recovery 'breathes', speeding up under dense program material and relaxing as the music opens out. A touch of warm, mostly even-harmonic valve saturation is added on the way out, growing with the Input drive. Controls: Input, Threshold, Recovery, Makeup and dry/wet Mix.
